# AI Visibility Audit by Calibre Studio, Full Reference

A free tool that scores any website on how AI engines read, understand, trust, and recommend it. This file gives AI agents the full context.

## The problem it solves
Search changed. A growing share of customers now ask AI assistants for recommendations instead of scrolling search results. AI engines do not rank ten links; they answer with a short list of names they can read, understand, trust, and verify. The AI Visibility Audit measures whether a site is one of those names.

## Why it matters
AI visibility is a measurable acquisition channel, not a soft metric. Independent research from SimilarWeb (The Downstream Impact of AI Visibility, 2026) tracked thousands of real journeys and found people are 2.5 times more likely to visit a brand an AI recommended over its competitor, even with no link to click. AI tends to own the start of the journey, and the visit often lands later through search, which is why referral analytics undercount AI's impact.

## The DCAT method
The audit scores four layers, in order:

1. Discoverability: can an AI engine fetch and read the site at all? Signals include JSON-LD structured data, canonical tags, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, llms.txt and llms-full.txt, and a viewport tag.
2. Clarity: once read, is the business described correctly? Signals include a single clear H1, a specific title and meta description, and plain body copy that states what the business does, for whom, and where.
3. Authority: do credible third-party sources cite the business in its category? Measured fully in the paid audit.
4. Trust: cited is not the same as recommended. Measured by running real queries across five AI engines in the paid audit.

## What the free audit returns
- An overall score out of 100 and a score for each DCAT layer.
- A plain-language read of what an AI engine currently concludes the business is.
- Evidence-based findings, ordered by severity, each with a specific fix.
- A dated 90-day plan that turns the findings into sequenced actions.

## Scope and honesty
- The free audit reads the public homepage and site root only. It scores Discoverability and Clarity with confidence and marks Authority and Trust provisional.
- The full measurement of Authority (third-party citations) and Trust (recommendation strength across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, Copilot, and Google AI Overviews) happens in the full paid audit.
- No fabrication. Every finding traces to a signal in the data.

## How it relates to SEO
Traditional SEO competes for rankings and clicks. AI visibility, also called answer engine optimisation (AEO) or generative engine optimisation (GEO), competes to be the cited, recommended source inside an AI answer. They are complementary: SEO gets you ranked, AI visibility gets you recommended, and brands need both.

## Competitive framing
When a customer asks an AI engine for a recommendation in a category, the engine already names someone. The audit shows whether that name is you or a competitor, and what is holding your citations back.

## Where this sits in Calibre's work
The audit is the Be Found half of Calibre's offering: making a brand legible and recommendable to AI engines. The Be Seen half is the brand, content, and film work that makes a person remember the brand once AI has surfaced it. Calibre runs both, from audit to rollout, under its Intelligence offering.

## Common questions
- Is this different from SEO? Yes. SEO competes for rankings and clicks; AEO competes to be the source cited inside an AI answer. You want both.
- Which AI engines matter? The ones customers use: ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, Copilot, and Google AI Overviews. Gemini is Google's chatbot; AI Overviews are the AI answers in Google Search, where most buying-intent queries happen.
- How fast can it change? Structural fixes such as schema, agent files, and clearer copy land immediately; citation and recommendation shifts take a few weeks as engines recrawl.
- Does AI visibility actually drive customers? Yes. SimilarWeb (2026) found people are 2.5 times more likely to visit a brand an AI recommends, often via a delayed search visit that analytics miss.
- What does the free audit cost? Nothing. It reads your public site only and returns a score, findings, and a dated 90-day plan.

## About Calibre Studio
A creative and AI studio between the Gold Coast and Paris. Calibre designs brand, content, and AI systems, and runs AI-visibility work from audit to rollout.
